entity.summary: HyperEVM MetaDEX and liquidity hub combining concentrated-liquidity and classic automated market makers, token swaps, liquidity provision, incentives, and deployed routing and pool infrastructure.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies nest as a HyperEVM MetaDEX and central liquidity venue with concentrated and classic AMM models, swaps, liquidity, incentives, and current deployed exchange contracts. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: nest unified AMM
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes nest as HyperEVM's central liquidity hub and documents concentrated-liquidity and classic volatile and stable AMM models, swaps, and modular liquidity infrastructure.

evidence.title: nest current contracts
evidence.notes: Current first-party contract registry publishes active factory, quoter, swap-router, position-manager, gauge, token, and RouterV2 addresses for the DEX.
